name: Pecan Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Coat a baking sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
In a large bowl, beat together the eggs and sugar until smooth. Beat in
the margarine, water, vanilla, and almond extract until well combined.
Stir in the flour, pecans, and baking powder until the dough forms a ball.
Divide the dough into two equal portions. Shape each portion into a 12-inch log and place on the prepared baking sheet. Bake for 20 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes. Using a sharp knife, slice the logs crosswise into 1/2-inch thick slices. Arrange the slices cut-side down on the baking sheet. Bake for an additional 20 minutes, or until lightly browned. Store in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 weeks, or freeze for up to 1 month.
